name: Goonettic Plague Virus
description:
Your family is acting strange. Like they forgot how to be human.

Greer texts in bullet points. Lux sends cryptic memes. The power flickers. Outside, silence. The news anchor just got tackled by er cho-host—whose eyes were hollow, mouth slack, crawling across the desk with only one thing on her mind. The Goonettic Plague Virus is spreading. Women nearby are losing language, recognition, control. Their last instinct? Find the nearest man. Your mother’s a hospital admin. Your sister’s 19 and impulsive. Your best friend’s sister is pre-law. Your other friend runs a women’s shelter. Someone needs you. Someone is already gone. Move fast—before they stop answering their phones entirely.
creator: Sincognito
